menu.title: Biryani Specials
menu.description: Aromatic, slow-cooked basmati rice with marinated meats or fresh vegetables, served with raita.

menu.title: Main Course
menu.description: Rich and creamy curries including Dal Makhani, Butter Chicken, and Paneer delicacies.

menu.title: Chaap & Starters
menu.description: Smoky tandoori soya chaap and flavorful starters to kick-off your memorable meal.

menu.title: Family Combos
menu.description: Perfectly portioned multi-course meals designed to satisfy the whole family.

reviews.name: Rahul S.
reviews.text: Loved the taste and affordability. The perfect spot for a family lunch. The biryani was absolutely fantastic.

reviews.name: Anjali M.
reviews.text: Friendly service and great ambience for family dinners. They really care about their customers and food quality.

reviews.name: Vikas K.
reviews.text: Best place in Ankur Vihar for authentic North Indian food. The chaap varieties are amazing and value for money.
